notes: Clear overhead of house, lot/backyard area, driveway, neighboring context; z18 adds golf-course/context.

Shows house frontage and rear/green-space context; lot is visible, though crosshair appears near road/front and adjacent construction area dominates lower frame.
Good top-down view of house, driveway, yard/lot edges, neighboring homes, and treed/golf-course context. z20 also useful but tighter.
Heavily obscured by trees and shadows; possible house/lot context visible, but backyard/lot boundaries are difficult to interpret.
Useful neighborhood and lot context with house/driveway visible; z20 is sharper but too tight/partially offset, while z19 shows more complete parcel surroundings.
Clear elevated view of house, street frontage, and much of surrounding lot/backyard context; z19 gives best balance.
House and lot context visible, but backyard/lot is partly obscured by dense trees and shadows.
House, street, and rear/side lot context are visible; some tree cover and shadow reduce clarity.
Good view of house, lawn, driveway/street frontage, and broader lot context.
